summary: Iteration 9 testing completed - ALL SUBSCRIPTION GATING FEATURES VERIFIED: (1) Auth gate renders with Hyt Orbis branding when not logged in, (2) Login/register flows work correctly, (3) AI panel shows gated message 'AI Features Require a Paid Plan' with 'View Plans' button for free users, (4) AI input disabled with 'Upgrade to use AI features' placeholder, (5) Pricing modal shows 3 plans (Explorer $0, Creator $9, Developer $29) with checkmarks/X for features, (6) Explorer shows 'Current Plan' badge for free users, (7) Backend APIs all working: /subscription/plans, /subscription/status, AI endpoints return 403 for free users, Stripe checkout returns valid URLs.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans returns all 3 plans (Explorer, Creator, Developer)
Backend: GET /api/subscription/status returns free plan for unauthenticated users
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with valid admin credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login rejects invalid credentials (401)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 for unauthenticated users
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user data for authenticated users
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout clears authentication
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates new user
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat returns 403 for free users (subscription gating)
Backend: POST /api/ai/auto-generate returns 403 for free users (subscription gating)
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout/stripe requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout/stripe rejects invalid plan (400)
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout/stripe rejects free plan (400)
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout/stripe returns checkout URL for creator plan
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout/stripe returns checkout URL for developer plan
Backend: GET /api/subscription/status returns plan for authenticated users
Frontend: Auth gate renders when not logged in
Frontend: Auth gate has Hyt Orbis branding with logo and title
Frontend: Auth gate shows 4 feature items (512x512 maps, AI generation, collaboration, exports)
Frontend: Login form has email, password, and submit button
Frontend: Register mode shows name field
Frontend: Can switch between login and register modes
Frontend: Login with admin credentials redirects to main app
Frontend: AI Panel visible after login
Frontend: AI gated message shows 'AI Features Require a Paid Plan'
Frontend: 'View Plans' button visible in AI panel
Frontend: AI input disabled with placeholder 'Upgrade to use AI features'
Frontend: Header 'Upgrade' button visible for free users
Frontend: Pricing modal opens from 'View Plans' button
Frontend: Pricing modal opens from header 'Upgrade' button
Frontend: Pricing grid shows 3 plan cards
Frontend: Explorer plan shows $0 with 'Current Plan' badge
Frontend: Creator plan shows $9/month with 'MOST POPULAR' badge
Frontend: Developer plan shows $29/month
Frontend: Creator plan has 'Upgrade to Creator' checkout button
Frontend: Developer plan has 'Upgrade to Developer' checkout button
Frontend: Pricing modal shows 15 checkmarks and 5 X marks for features
Frontend: Logout returns to auth gate
critical_code_review_comments: Auth gate implementation is clean with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Subscription gating in auth_utils.py correctly checks plan features via PLAN_FEATURES map
AI endpoints properly call require_subscription() to gate features
Frontend isFeatureGated() function correctly maps features to plan restrictions
Pricing modal shows clear visual distinction between included (checkmark) and excluded (X) features
Stripe checkout integration properly validates plan_id and origin_url
httpOnly cookies used for auth tokens (secure=True, samesite='none')
seed_data_creation: Test user created for subscription gating tests. Test worlds created and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 testing completed successfully. SUBSCRIPTION GATING FULLY VERIFIED: (1) Auth gate with Hyt Orbis branding renders when not logged in, (2) Login/register flows work with httpOnly cookies, (3) AI panel shows gated message for free users with 'View Plans' button, (4) AI input disabled with 'Upgrade to use AI features' placeholder, (5) Pricing modal shows 3 tiers: Explorer $0 (Current Plan badge), Creator $9/mo (MOST POPULAR), Developer $29/mo, (6) Feature checkmarks and X marks clearly show included/excluded features, (7) Backend AI endpoints return 403 for free users, (8) Stripe checkout returns valid URLs for paid plans. All 16 backend tests passed. Note: Stripe checkout won't complete in test environment but URL generation works.

features_tested.auth_gate: Full-screen auth gate with Hyt Orbis branding, login/register forms
features_tested.auth_flow: Login, register, logout all working with httpOnly cookies
features_tested.ai_gating_ui: AI panel shows gated message, disabled input, View Plans button
features_tested.pricing_modal: 3 plans with prices, features, checkmarks/X, checkout buttons
features_tested.header_upgrade: Upgrade button visible for free users, opens pricing modal
features_tested.backend_ai_gating: POST /api/ai/chat and /api/ai/auto-generate return 403 for free users
